title: Curriculum masking of the unpaired surrogate: reveal quantized onset early, anneal to pitch-only
Auxiliary tuplet/beat-phase prediction head trained ONLY from the existing offset stream (no new labels, no architecture change at inference)
Difficulty-aware conditioning token + per-sample decoder dropout (turn the binary c_i into a graded density signal)
Checkpoint selection by a MUSTER-proxy (over-production calibration metric) instead of val/total — close the val!=MUSTER gap with zero new training
Denoising-SSL variant: corrupt the surrogate with realistic performance noise so the encoder learns to be robust to dense fast passages (and measure the full 14-piece standing)
Noisy-student self-training: pseudo-label MAESTRO performances with ssl_classical_clean, keep only high-confidence pairs, fold into the REAL branch
Renderer-minted EXACTLY-aligned pairs at a SMALL fraction in the PAIRED branch (alignment signal, domain gap subordinated)
MUSTER-selected checkpointing + over-production calibration sweep (turn val!=MUSTER into a free gain, zero training)
Measure all 14 ASAP test pieces to establish true standing and locate the real residual (zero training, prerequisite for everything)
Confidence/difficulty-stratified pseudo-label curriculum: harvest MAESTRO by difficulty band to specifically attack the dense-passage miss-rate without amplifying error
Density-matched unpaired corpus: reshape (not grow) the SSL pool to the ASAP-test note-density histogram
Tuplet-rate balancing: bucket the unpaired corpus by actual tuplet token fraction and hold it to the test rate
Simple->dense curriculum on the unpaired stream (sort by density, anneal the cap)
Per-sample inverse-density loss/exposure weighting in the WeightedRandomSampler (1-line lever)
Over-production-aware checkpoint selection: evaluate all 14 test pieces + add a calibration metric, since val!=MUSTER
Expose the continuous pad-sigmoid in generate() and sweep the REAL note-keep threshold (the current --pad-threshold is a no-op)
Per-head decoding: greedy pad/duration, low-temperature pitch — decouple the globally-shared top_k/temperature
Overlap-window voting / self-ensemble using the existing chunked AR loop to stabilize dense-passage notes
Measure the full 14-piece ASAP test split at multiple thresholds to find our true standing and the over-production frontier
Beat-phase-consistent offset decoding: nudge the offset head toward the input MIDI's own onset grid on dense passages (speculative)

lens: literature-contrarian (2023-2026 piano AMT / MIDI-to-score / symbolic-music / rhythm-quantization literature, mapped onto the ssl_classical_clean asset stack)
